subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the sealed wine, when the Self-Subsisting appeared from the horizon of the heaven of utterance with sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بالرحیق المختوم اذ اتی القیوم من افق سماء البیان بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
